prompts.name: 白细胞介素（IL-2、IL-4、IL-6、IL-12）信号通路
prompts.content:
我对 Nano Banana Pro 简直爱不释手！它能从简单的提示词生成科学精确的插图，这简直令人叹为观止！这是AI时代真正的转折点之一！

提示词：在多面板中创建 IL-2、IL-4、IL-12、IL-6 信号通路
prompts.author: Derya Unutmaz, MD
prompts.nameEn: Interleukin (IL-2, IL-4, IL-6, IL-12) Signaling Pathways
prompts.contentEn:
I can’t get enough of Nano Banana Pro! The way it generates scientifically precise illustrations from simple prompts is nothing short of mind blowing! One of those true inflection points in the age of AI!

Prompt: In multi panels create İL-2, IL-4, IL-12, IL-6 signaling pathways

prompts.name: Nano Banana Pro 模板
prompts.content: {"aspect_ratio": "9:16", "scene_type": "室内运动队合影", "camera": {"device": "智能手机或数码相机", "angle": "平视", "framing": "三位人物全身照，竖幅构图", "focus": "人物和背景文字清晰对焦", "style": "休闲团队抓拍"}, "subjects": [{"position": "左侧", "gender": "女性", "build": "健美身材", "hair": {"color": "浅棕色", "length": "长发", "style": "直发，自然披散在肩上"}, "face": {"shape": "椭圆脸", "expression": "灿烂笑容", "eyes": "睁眼，看向镜头", "emotion": "开心自信"}, "body_posture": {"stance": "直立站姿", "weight_distribution": "双脚均匀承重", "arms": "一只手叉腰，另一只手臂自然下垂", "feet": "赤脚，平踩地面"}, "clothing": {"type": "体操连体衣", "primary_color": "栗色", "details": "长袖带网眼和水钻装饰，躯干处有浅色渐变设计"}}, {"position": "中间", "gender": "女性", "build": "健美身材", "hair": {"color": "中棕色", "length": "长发", "style": "直发，接近中分"}, "face": {"shape": "圆脸到椭圆脸", "expression": "俏皮，舌头微伸", "eyes": "睁眼，看向镜头", "emotion": "活力四射，俏皮"}, "body_posture": {"stance": "深蹲", "knees": "向外弯曲", "arms": "双手举起做手势", "feet": "赤脚，脚跟微抬"}, "clothing": {"type": "体操连体衣", "primary_color": "栗色", "details": "长袖，闪亮装饰，胸部有浅色花纹"}}, {"position": "右侧", "gender": "女性", "build": "健美身材", "hair": {"color": "金色", "length": "长发", "style": "宽松波浪卷"}, "face": {"shape": "椭圆脸", "expression": "微笑，舌头俏皮地伸出", "eyes": "睁眼，瞥向镜头", "emotion": "有趣，俏皮"}, "body_posture": {"stance": "站立，背部部分转向", "torso": "身体略微转向镜头", "arms": "双手按在墙上", "feet": "赤脚，脚跟着地"}, "clothing": {"type": "体操连体衣", "primary_color": "栗色和金色", "details": "长袖，金色上部对比设计，水钻装饰"}}], "environment": {"location": "室内运动场馆或学校建筑", "background": {"wall_material": "水平木板墙面", "text": {"words": "Maroon & Gold", "font_style": "粗体无衬线", "colors": ["栗色", "金色"], "placement": "居中位于人物身后"}, "floor": "抛光棕色地面"}}, "lighting": {"type": "室内环境光", "direction": "正面均匀照明", "quality": "柔和，无生硬阴影"}, "style": {"genre": "运动队合影", "aesthetic": "休闲，庆祝氛围", "mood": "团队荣誉感，俏皮活力"}, "quality_tags": ["清晰的面部表情", "准确的姿态", "详细的服装细节", "团队环境", "竖幅构图", "无水印"]}
prompts.author: sammy

prompts.name: Gemini Nano Banana Pro 模板
prompts.content: {"subject": {"description": "年轻女性躺在床上", "pose": "趴着，用手肘撑起身体，双腿在身后抬起交叉于脚踝处", "expression": "嘟嘴，直视镜头", "hair": "长直发，深棕色，自然散落", "clothing": {"hat": "红白相间的圣诞帽，带白色毛边和绒球", "outfit": "红色天鹅绒长袖连衣裙或上衣，带白色毛边袖口", "stockings": "透明白色大腿袜"}, "hands": "右手举到脸旁，展示红色法式美甲指甲"}, "setting": {"location": "卧室内部", "furniture": "铺有白色床单和枕头的床", "background_elements": ["奶油色墙壁带装饰线条", "带褶皱灯罩的台灯", "挂在墙壁/床头板上的圣诞彩灯花环", "远处的小圣诞树带彩灯"]}, "lighting": "温暖的室内环境光", "perspective": "高角度，俯视人物", "orientation": "竖幅"}
prompts.author: Melisa♡

prompts.name: Gemini Nano Banana Pro 节日肖像模板
prompts.content: {"lighting": {"quality": "硬质闪光灯配合柔和环境光", "shadows": "闪光灯投射的锐利阴影，尤其在人物身后和百叶窗上", "direction": "正面", "highlights": "闪光灯在人物脸部、手部和毛衣上形成强烈高光，树上有小的暖色光点", "ambient_source": "圣诞树上温暖的LED灯", "primary_source": "机顶闪光灯"}, "background": {"setting": "室内，可能是夜间客厅", "elements": ["带温暖白色LED灯和红色蝴蝶结的雪花装饰圣诞树", "带深色水平百叶窗的大窗户，反射闪光灯和室内灯光", "深色墙壁"], "depth_cues": "圣诞树稍在人物身后，窗户更靠后，营造景深", "lighting_interaction": "树灯温暖柔和；闪光灯在窗玻璃上形成亮斑"}, "typography": {"color": "", "presence": "无", "placement": "", "font_style": "", "text_content": ""}, "composition": {"frame_type": "中景", "focus_point": "人物脸部", "orientation": "竖幅", "camera_angle": "平视", "depth_of_field": "浅景深", "subject_placement": "居中"}, "color_profile": {"contrast": "高对比度", "saturation": "中等", "color_balance": "暖色调", "dominant_colors": ["#FFFFFF", "#E10000", "#4A5D48", "#C9A082"], "palette_description": "温暖节日色调，以毛衣的白色和红色为主导，配有树的绿色和灯光的暖黄色调"}, "technical_specs": {"iso": "高感光度（低光环境）", "aperture": "大光圈（浅景深）", "image_type": "数码照片", "resolution": "高分辨率", "camera_type": "智能手机相机", "file_format": "JPEG", "shutter_speed": "快门速度快（使用闪光灯）"}, "subject_analysis": {"hair": "长卷发，银灰色，中分，垂落在肩上", "pose": "站立，双手按在脸颊上，嘟嘴亲亲表情，闭眼", "makeup": "水光肌，精致眉形，长睫毛，玫瑰色腮红，光泽唇彩", "clothing": "宽松白色针织毛衣，红色费尔岛图案，有雪花和几何设计", "expression": "俏皮，嘟嘴亲亲", "accessories": "无明显配饰", "subject_type": "年轻女性", "hands_gestures": "双手带浅粉色美甲，轻按脸颊，框住脸庞"}, "artistic_elements": {"mood": "俏皮，节日，温馨", "style": "生活化人像", "texture": "毛衣的柔软针织，圣诞树的雪花装饰纹理，窗户上的光滑反光", "composition_balance": "人物居中，左侧圣诞树和右侧窗户形成平衡"}, "generation_parameters": {"seed": "festive_portrait_flash", "prompt": "一张生活化人像，展示一位留着长卷棕发的年轻女性，身穿宽松的白色和红色雪花图案针织毛衣，双手按在脸颊上做嘟嘴亲亲表情。她站在夜晚的室内，旁边是一棵装饰着温暖灯光和红色蝴蝶结的雪花圣诞树，以及一扇反射着闪光灯的深色百叶窗。照明是机顶闪光灯和树上的温暖环境光混合。", "aspect_ratio": "4:5", "negative_prompt": "日光，明亮阳光，普通墙壁，无树，无毛衣，微笑，睁眼，无闪光灯"}}
prompts.author: Melisa♡
prompts.contentEn:
{
  "lighting": {
    "quality": "hard flash with soft ambient",
    "shadows": "sharp shadows cast by the flash, especially behind the subject and on the window blinds",
    "direction": "frontal",
    "highlights": "strong highlights on the subject's face, hands, and sweater from the flash, with small warm points of light from the tree",
    "ambient_source": "warm LED Christmas lights on tree",
    "primary_source": "on-camera flash"
  },
  "background": {
    "setting": "indoors, likely a living room at night",
    "elements": [
      "flocked Christmas tree with warm white LED lights and a red ribbon bow",
      "large window with dark horizontal blinds, showing reflections of the flash and room lights",
      "dark wall"
    ],
    "depth_cues": "tree is slightly behind the subject, window is further back, creating depth",
    "lighting_interaction": "tree lights are warm and soft; flash creates a bright spot on the window glass"
  },
  "typography": {
    "color": "",
    "presence": "none",
    "placement": "",
    "font_style": "",
    "text_content": ""
  },
  "composition": {
    "frame_type": "medium shot",
    "focus_point": "subject's face",
    "orientation": "vertical",
    "camera_angle": "eye-level",
    "depth_of_field": "shallow",
    "subject_placement": "centered"
  },
  "color_profile": {
    "contrast": "high",
    "saturation": "moderate",
    "color_balance": "warm",
    "dominant_colors": [
      "#FFFFFF",
      "#E10000",
      "#4A5D48",
      "#C9A082"
    ],
    "palette_description": "warm and festive palette dominated by white and red from the sweater, with green from the tree and warm yellow tones from the lights"
  },
  "technical_specs": {
    "iso": "high (due to low light environment)",
    "aperture": "wide (shallow depth of field)",
    "image_type": "digital photograph",
    "resolution": "high",
    "camera_type": "smartphone camera",
    "file_format": "JPEG",
    "shutter_speed": "fast (due to flash)"
  },
  "subject_analysis": {
    "hair": "long, wavy, silver grey hair, parted in the middle, falling over shoulders",
    "pose": "standing, hands pressed to cheeks, making a kissy face with eyes closed",
    "makeup": "dewy skin, defined eyebrows, long eyelashes, rosy blush, glossy lips",
    "clothing": "oversized white knit sweater with a red Fair Isle pattern featuring snowflakes and geometric designs",
    "expression": "playful, pouting kiss",
    "accessories": "none visible",
    "subject_type": "young woman",
    "hands_gestures": "both hands with light pink manicured nails pressing gently against her cheeks, framing her face"
  },
  "artistic_elements": {
    "mood": "playful, festive, cozy",
    "style": "candid portrait",
    "texture": "soft knit of the sweater, flocked texture of the tree, glossy reflection on the window",
    "composition_balance": "subject centered, balanced by the tree on the left and window on the right"
  },
  "generation_parameters": {
    "seed": "festive_portrait_flash",
    "prompt": "A candid portrait of a young woman with long wavy brown hair, wearing an oversized white and red snowflake knit sweater, posing with a kissy face and hands on her cheeks. She is standing indoors at night next to a flocked Christmas tree decorated with warm lights and a red bow, and a window with dark blinds reflecting a flash. The lighting is a mix of on-camera flash and warm ambient light from the tree.",
    "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
    "negative_prompt": "daylight, bright sun, plain wall, no tree, no sweater, smiling, open eyes, no flash"
  }
}
